mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 3.5% (CPIAUCSL) triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signals, or CPIAUCSL's predictive power loses significance (p > 0.10 in rolling regressions).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust economic activity, driving corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between INDPRO and HOUST shows negative coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions, or 60d returns underperform by > 15% in co-moving growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening labor market (UNRATE falling > 0.5pp) combined with strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150k) signals rising wage pressures, prompting Fed rate hikes and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX records positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where both UNRATE and PAYEMS meet triggering thresholds, or interaction term loses significance (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Declining residential construction (RSAFS) amid rising home sales (HOUST) indicates a housing market correction, reducing consumer wealth and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 55% of cases where RSAFS and HOUST meet triggering conditions, or interaction term's t-statistic < 1.96.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) signals weakening supply-side capacity, reducing corporate margins and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns exceed 10% in 40%+ of INDPRO contraction periods, or INDPRO's coefficient in regressions falls below -0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden rise in unemployment (UNRATE > 4.5%) during a recessionary regime signals deteriorating labor conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX records positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.5%, or predictive power loses significance (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A dovish monetary policy shift (FEDFUNDS decline > 50bps) during high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 3.0%) creates a 'stagflation' risk, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 55% of cases where both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL meet triggering conditions, or interaction term's t-statistic < 1.96.
